key.name: layout-id
key.summary: Active layout id. Only "Default" valid in Sub-project A.

key.name: show-number-row
key.summary: Render the number row on the Default layout.

key.name: theme-mode
key.summary: One of "light", "dark", "auto". "auto" follows the GNOME color scheme.

key.name: accent-color
key.summary: Accent used for active/focus highlights. CSS hex string.

key.name: compact-density
key.summary: Render slightly smaller styling. No layout switch in A.

key.name: key-height
key.summary: Logical key height in px. Clamped to [44,80].

key.name: key-spacing
key.summary: Logical key spacing in px. Clamped to [2,12].

key.name: key-radius
key.summary: Logical corner radius in px. Clamped to [0,20].

key.name: font-scale
key.summary: Multiplier on key label font size. Clamped to [0.8,1.5].

key.name: debug-logging
key.summary: Verbose logging to journalctl. Off by default.

key.name: position-mode
key.summary: Reserved seam. Only "bottom" implemented in A; other values coerce to "bottom".
